name: Further
short_description: Embark on an odyssey beyond the stars in "Further," a spellbinding virtual reality adventure that defies the limits of space and imagination. Assume the role of Alex, a fearless protagonist thrust into an interstellar realm of trials, puzzles, and encounters with extraterrestrial entities.
detailed_description:
Embark on an odyssey beyond the stars in "Further," a spellbinding virtual reality adventure that defies the limits of space and imagination. Assume the role of Alex, a fearless protagonist thrust into an solar asteroid mining realm of trials  and encounters with extraterrestrial entities.

Key Features:

Immersive VR gameplay blending tests, stealth, and FPS battles.

Developed by a solo indie developer, this game is a labor of love created with passion and care. While every effort has been made to provide a great experience, your feedback is invaluable to help refine and improve the game 'further'. Thank you for supporting indie games.

supported_languages:
English*, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
